54949.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
54949.description: Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan. Here, Stanley enjoys an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri, a noodle made from buckwheat, and enjoys classic Milanese veal chops and risotto.

54950.title: Inside Africa
54950.description: From superbikes to racecars and beyond, highlighting some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels and providing an inside look at what life is like on and off the race track.

54951.title: African Voices Changemakers
54951.description: Following a Kenyan media producer who is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive. Highlighting the visionary behind South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

54952.title: Africa Avant Garde
54952.description: A look at some of the most influential living modern and contemporary artists as well as a visit to a museum which celebrates the best of contemporary African art.

54953.title: Marketplace Africa
54953.description: A look at the contemporary African art market. Given the wide range of applications, looking at how satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

54954.title: Marketplace Africa
54954.description: Kenya's apparel sector localizes its supply chain and the role of Kenya-based textile manufacturers; African designers looking for success internationally face unique hurdles.

54955.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
54955.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

54956.title: Connecting Africa
54956.description: From the CEO of a massive energy company in South Africa and fruit exporters in Egypt to the man who bought a bank in Nigeria, looking at all of the aspects of doing business in Africa.

54962.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
54962.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes that use stale bread as the key ingredient.

54963.title: Inside Politics
54963.description: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

54964.title: State of the Union with Jake Tapper
54964.description: Newsmakers and Washington power players discuss current issues and events, with additional commentary by a panel of reporters and analysts. Hosted by Jake Tapper, the Sunday morning program also goes beyond the Beltway for a perspective on how everyday Americans are faring in today's world.

54965.title: Fareed Zakaria GPS
54965.description: Host, columnist, and best-selling author Fareed Zakaria offers insightful analysis and interviews world leaders, artists, scientists, business leaders, global affairs analysts, and other cultural observers for the `Global Public Square'. Zakaria is also a syndicated columnist for The Washington Post, a contributing editor for The Atlantic magazine, and hosts in-depth, prime-time specials for CNN Worldwide. `Fareed Zakaria GPS' was launched in 2008 and each week's program airs worldwide on CNN, from New York or other locations around the world. The program is characterized by smart debate and discussion on world events and public affairs, designed to help viewers understand the world around them and the newest thinking on the globe's biggest challenges.
